---
title: Jade Liang
favicon: images/circle-small.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/jade.jpg
  image-width: 90%
  image-shape: rounded
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jade-y-liang
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jade-yuqiong-liang
    - icon: inbox-fill
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:jade.y.liang@gmail.com"
    - icon: file-person
      text: Resume
      url: "Resume.pdf"
toc: false
---

# Welcome!

## About Me

I am a recent graduate from the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA), where I double majoried in **Mathematics** and **Statistics & Data Science**, with a **Specialization in Computing**. My fascination lies in the transformative power of data. I am particularly passionate about applying statistical methods and data-driven insights to solve real-world problems.

With a strong foundation in mathematics, programming, and data analysis, I am actively seeking opportunities where I can contribute my skills and continue to grow professionally.
